rewriteRule: Submit/reset label ve handler ciftleri canonical siraya alinip explicit access fallback'i eklenir; children slot'u korunur.

rewritePreview.after: <ReportFilterPanel submitLabel={t('reports.filters.apply')} resetLabel={t('reports.filters.reset')} onSubmit={handleSubmit} onReset={handleReset} loading={loading} access="full">

stopConditions: children slot'u render-prop ise rewrite atlanir
access prop'u expression ise owner onayi olmadan rewrite uygulanmaz

rollbackPlan: submit/reset label string'leri lokalize expression disina cikarsa diff geri alinir
slot render davranisi degisirse component owner review zorunlu kalir
notes: Bu prototype yuksek risklidir; rewrite preview yalniz olasi hedef duzeni gosterir.
